nasb.text: Then the slave-girl who kept the door *said to Peter, “You are not also one of this man’s disciples, are you?” He *said, “I am not.”

esv.text: The servant girl at the door said to Peter, “You also are not one of this man’s disciples, are you?” He said, “I am not.”

cnv.text: 那看門的婢女對彼得說：“你不也是這個人的門徒嗎？”他說：“我不是。”

ccb.text: 看门的女仆问彼得：“你不也是这个人的门徒吗？” 他说：“我不是。”

csbs.text: 那看门的女仆问彼得：“你不也是这个人的门徒吗？” 彼得说：“我不是。”
